name: StreamingText
description: Token-by-token streaming text renderer for AI responses.

api.name: StreamingText
api.description: Token-by-token streaming text renderer for AI responses.

examples.title: Static Text
examples.code: <StreamingText Text="Blazor is a framework for building interactive web UIs using C# instead of JavaScript." IsStreaming="false" />

examples.title: Streaming Simulation
examples.code:
<StreamingText Text="@_text" IsStreaming="@_streaming" />

@code {
    private string _text = string.Empty;
    private bool _streaming;

    // Update _text incrementally as tokens arrive from your AI API
}

examples.title: With Blinking Cursor While Streaming
examples.code:
<StreamingText Text="@_text" IsStreaming="@_streaming" />
<!-- IsStreaming=true shows a blinking cursor at the end -->
<!-- Set IsStreaming=false when the response is complete -->

mdSummary:
# StreamingText

Token-by-token streaming text renderer for AI responses.

**Package:** `Lumeo` · **Category:** AI
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/streaming-text

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| StreamingText | Text | `string?` | `` |  |
| StreamingText | IsStreaming | `bool` | `` |  |
| StreamingText | Prose | `bool` | `` |  |
| StreamingText | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| StreamingText | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |
